description:
To properly set the permissions of /etc/http/conf, run the command: 
$ sudo chmod 0750 /etc/http/conf
rationale:
Access to the web server's configuration files may allow an unauthorized user or attacker
to access information about the web server or alter the server's configuration files.
ocil:
To check the permissions of /etc/http/conf, run the command: 
$ ls -l /etc/http/conf
If properly configured, the output should indicate the following permissions: -rwxr-x---
title: Set Permissions on the /etc/httpd/conf/ Directory
